# PHIL.048 ? Nominalism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** medieval_religious
**Subcategory:** nominalism
**Domain:** MEDIEVAL_RELIGIOUS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Universals are names only; only particulars exist; Ockham's razor; radical divine freedom; empirical emphasis

## Application
Focus on particulars over universals; simplify explanations; recognize conventional nature of categories; divine voluntarism

## Key Values
- Particularism
- Simplicity
- Conventionalism
- Divine freedom

## Tags
philosophy, medieval-religious, nominalism
